description: Dest pipeline for m_26_14-store-feed transform. Stamps write-time @timestamp for Entity Store lookback and promotes transform attestation aggregates into ECS fields the host engine uses for entity.source (data_stream.dataset) and operator triage (event.module, m_26_14.collector). Attestation means logs referenced this identity — not hardware proof.

script.description: Freshness timestamp + dataset/module attestation for discovered entities
script.source: ctx['@timestamp'] = new Date(); if (ctx.datasets != null && ctx.datasets instanceof Map && !ctx.datasets.isEmpty()) { def ds = new ArrayList(); for (def k : ctx.datasets.keySet()) { if (k != null) { ds.add(k.toString()); } } if (!ds.isEmpty()) { if (ctx.data_stream == null) { ctx.data_stream = new HashMap(); } ctx.data_stream.dataset = ds; } } if (ctx.event_modules != null && ctx.event_modules instanceof Map && !ctx.event_modules.isEmpty()) { def mods = new ArrayList(); for (def k : ctx.event_modules.keySet()) { if (k != null) { mods.add(k.toString()); } } if (!mods.isEmpty()) { if (ctx.event == null) { ctx.event = new HashMap(); } ctx.event.module = mods.size() == 1 ? mods.get(0) : mods; } } String hn = null; if (ctx.host != null && ctx.host.name != null) { hn = ctx.host.name.toString(); } if (hn != null && hn.startsWith('observed-')) { if (ctx.m_26_14 == null) { ctx.m_26_14 = new HashMap(); } ctx.m_26_14.attestation = 'log_reference'; int at = hn.indexOf('@'); if (at > 0 && at < hn.length() - 1) { ctx.m_26_14.collector = hn.substring(at + 1); } }
